mapper.select: SELECT id, page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND template_code = #{templateCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND enabled = TRUE AND is_default = TRUE ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO workflow_template (page_code, template_code, name, config_json, enabled, is_default, updated_at) VALUES (#{pageCode}, #{templateCode}, #{name}, #{configJson}::jsonb, #{enabled}, #{isDefault}, NOW()) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_template SET name = #{name}, config_json = #{configJson}::jsonb, enabled = #{enabled}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE workflow_template SET is_default = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND is_default = TRUE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM workflow_template WHERE page_code = #{pageCode} AND template_code = #{templateCode}
mapper.select: SELECT id, page_code, data, status, workflow_template_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM data_record WHERE id = #{recordId} AND page_code = #{pageCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_task (record_id, page_code, template_id, template_code, node_code, assignee, status, action, comment, operated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{pageCode}, #{templateId}, #{templateCode}, #{nodeCode}, #{assignee}, #{status}, #{action}, #{comment}, #{operatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM workflow_task WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND node_code = #{nodeCode} AND status = 'pending' ORDER BY id
SELECT id FROM workflow_task WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND status = 'pending' AND assignee = #{assignee} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT node_code FROM workflow_task WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'done', action = #{action}, comment = #{comment}, operated_by = #{operator}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'cancelled', action = 'skip', updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND node_code = #{nodeCode} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE workflow_task SET status = 'cancelled', action = 'skip', updated_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND node_code = #{nodeCode} AND status = 'pending'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task t JOIN data_record r ON r.id = t.record_id AND r.page_code = t.page_code WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.assignee = #{assignee} AND t.page_code = #{pageCode} AND r.data::text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%')

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.record_id, t.page_code, t.template_code, wt.name AS template_name, t.node_code, t.assignee, t.status AS task_status, t.action, t.comment, t.created_at AS task_created_at, t.updated_at AS task_updated_at, r.status AS record_status, r.data, r.created_at AS record_created_at, r.updated_at AS record_updated_at, r.created_by FROM workflow_task t JOIN data_record r ON r.id = t.record_id AND r.page_code = t.page_code LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.page_code = t.page_code AND wt.template_code = t.template_code WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND t.assignee = #{assignee} AND t.page_code = #{pageCode} AND r.data::text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM workflow_task t JOIN data_record r ON r.id = t.record_id AND r.page_code = t.page_code WHERE t.status = 'done' AND t.action IN ('approve', 'reject') AND t.operated_by = #{operator} AND t.page_code = #{pageCode} AND r.data::text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%')

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.record_id, t.page_code, t.template_code, wt.name AS template_name, t.node_code, t.assignee, t.status AS task_status, t.action, t.comment, t.operated_by, t.created_at AS task_created_at, t.updated_at AS task_updated_at, r.status AS record_status, r.data, r.created_at AS record_created_at, r.updated_at AS record_updated_at, r.created_by FROM workflow_task t JOIN data_record r ON r.id = t.record_id AND r.page_code = t.page_code LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.page_code = t.page_code AND wt.template_code = t.template_code WHERE t.status = 'done' AND t.action IN ('approve', 'reject') AND t.operated_by = #{operator} AND t.page_code = #{pageCode} AND r.data::text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id AS record_id, r.page_code, r.status AS record_status, r.workflow_template_code AS template_code, wt.name AS template_name, r.data, r.created_at AS record_created_at, r.updated_at AS record_updated_at, p.node_code AS pending_node_code, p.pending_assignees FROM data_record r LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.page_code = r.page_code AND wt.template_code = r.workflow_template_code LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT t.node_code, string_agg(t.assignee, ',' ORDER BY t.id) AS pending_assignees FROM workflow_task t WHERE t.record_id = r.id AND t.status = 'pending' GROUP BY t.node_code ORDER BY MIN(t.id) LIMIT 1 ) p ON TRUE WHERE r.created_by = #{operator} AND r.page_code = #{pageCode} AND r.status = #{status} AND r.data::text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.record_id, t.page_code, t.template_code, wt.name AS template_name, t.node_code, t.assignee, t.status AS task_status, t.action, t.comment, t.operated_by, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM workflow_task t LEFT JOIN workflow_template wt ON wt.page_code = t.page_code AND wt.template_code = t.template_code WHERE t.record_id = #{recordId} AND t.page_code = #{pageCode} ORDER BY t.id ASC
